nodes.name: Black-crested warbler
nodes.summary: The black-crested warbler (Myiothlypis nigrocristata) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. References

nodes.summary: Myiothlypis（Myiothlypis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Grey-headed warbler、Santa Marta warbler、Citrine warbler等15种鸟类。
